notes: This packet reflects the pre-win actor-yaw restart strategy from April 14, 2026.
Use the focused-PostMessage discovery prompt for current and future live feature recovery unless you specifically need to compare the pre-win and post-win actor-yaw approaches.

task.goal: recover actor yaw first, pitch second
definition_of_done: Identify a current-process actor yaw source that survives the April 14, 2026 update and does not depend on stale lineage.
Prefer addon/API-visible heading, facing, yaw, or pitch when it validates cleanly under controlled Left/Right turn stimuli.
Only fall back to bounded live memory recovery when the addon path still yields no usable yaw signal.
Keep edits minimal and capture machine-readable evidence, commands run, validation results, and exact stop point.
forbidden_actions: Start from the old source-chain or selector-owner rebuild path.
Treat stale actor-orientation captures as authoritative current truth.
Reuse stale absolute addresses, stale source objects, or pre-update offsets as if they were current.
Spend time on camera recovery unless actor-yaw recovery is blocked.

current_probe_fact.note: Latest exported ReaderBridge orientation probe file contains no orientationProbe block and no player or target signal.

repo_source_fact.note: The repo source already contains orientation-probe-related code paths for Inspect.Unit.Heading, Inspect.Unit.Pitch, orientation-like key scans, and ReaderBridge.State probing. If the live export is still empty, verify addon validation, sync, export freshness, and pruning behavior before broad rewrites.

forbidden_actions: Assume any dated analysis report is current truth without checking its state and role.
Promote any stale artifact-derived address to current truth without current-process validation.
Patch the shared Cheat Engine debugger attach guards based on a single Error 87 occurrence.
Mix the fresh selected-source lineage and the older projector or hub lineage without relabeling the evidence.

authoritative_inputs.role: living truth for what is currently valid
canonical rebuild order and escalation order
authoritative stop-point evidence for the actor-yaw recovery restart path
authoritative dated evidence that the reader baseline survived but the owner or source chain drifted
authoritative dated evidence for CE usage constraints and Error 87 handling

historical_priors.role: field-role, naming, and side-channel priors only
pre-update actor-orientation evidence and transform-family shape prior
pre-update basis determinant and duplicate-agreement prior
stale or failed stimulus evidence only
forbidden_use: proof that actor yaw is solved

expected: trace-derived sample remains consistent with current ReaderBridge coordinates

broken_paths.evidence: post-update source-chain refresh and selector-owner trace drifted
failed to locate required instruction: source container load
status remained armed without live hit
not current truth unless regenerated on the updated client
not current truth unless regenerated on the updated client
not current truth unless regenerated on the updated client
use as a historical clue only, never as a literal modern offset contract
may fail with Error attaching the windows debugger: 87

forbidden_start_points: camera recovery scripts on feature branches
stale absolute addresses copied from dated captures

execution_order.name: ground_and_verify_baselines
execution_order.goal: Prove the reader baseline still works before touching actor-yaw-specific recovery.
required_classification: Mark each cited input as current, stale, or historical before using it.
Reject stale addresses and stale source objects even if they look plausible.
advance_when: coord-anchor still resolves through the current module-local pattern

execution_order.name: inspect_current_orientation_probe
execution_order.goal: Determine whether the addon layer already exposes a usable actor heading, facing, yaw, or pitch signal.

execution_order.name: repair_addon_first
execution_order.goal: Make the addon export a non-empty orientationProbe block before doing broad memory recovery.
notes: The repo already contains orientation-probe logic; first determine whether the problem is missing deployment, missing export trigger, pruning to nil, or incomplete probe data.
Patch only what is necessary to emit orientationProbe and make /rap orientation surface direct heading/pitch or orientation-like candidates.
required_behavior: Probe Inspect.Unit.Heading and Inspect.Unit.Pitch for player and target.
Scan Inspect.Unit.Detail, ReaderBridge.State, and Inspect.Stat for heading, pitch, yaw, face, facing, orient, orientation, or rotation keys.
Preserve minimal-risk behavior and avoid unrelated addon rewrites.

execution_order.name: validate_sync_export_recheck
execution_order.goal: Validate addon changes, deploy them, refresh the live export, and confirm whether orientationProbe is now present.

execution_order.name: validate_addon_as_primary_yaw_source
execution_order.goal: Use controlled Left and Right stimuli to prove that the addon-exposed signal behaves like actor yaw.
advance_when: a direct heading, yaw, or facing-derived signal changes correctly under Left and Right turns
Left and Right produce opposite-sign turn deltas or equivalent directional facing change
then: Adopt the addon-visible signal as the primary actor-yaw source.
Do only the smallest reader or tooling wiring needed to consume or preserve that signal.
Do not broaden into raw memory rediscovery once addon truth is sufficient.

execution_order.name: bounded_live_memory_recovery
execution_order.goal: If addon truth is still unavailable, recover actor yaw from bounded live memory around current player coordinates.
selection_rules: Prefer candidates that match current player coordinates in the current process.
Prefer transform-like candidates with meaningful vectors, orthonormality, determinant near 1, and duplicate-basis agreement.
Reject any candidate that depends on stale owner-components lineage or stale absolute addresses.
advance_when: candidate search returns a current-process source with coord agreement
controlled Left and Right validation produces believable opposite-sign yaw change with low coord drift

execution_order.name: ce_scan_confirmation_only
execution_order.goal: Use CE as a confirmation lane, not as the default discovery lane.
on_error_87: do not patch shared Lua attach guards from a single failure

success_gates.name: baseline_gate
criteria: player-current read succeeds and still matches ReaderBridge.
coord-anchor still resolves pattern F3 0F 10 86 5C 01 00 00 with coord offsets 0x158/0x15C/0x160.

success_gates.name: addon_signal_gate
criteria: orientationProbe is present in the exported ReaderBridge snapshot.
At least one player-facing signal exists: directHeading, yaw, facing, or a stable orientation-like candidate.
The signal is current-process evidence, not copied from stale captures.

success_gates.name: yaw_validation_gate
criteria: Left and Right turn stimuli produce opposite-sign yaw or heading deltas, or equivalent monotonic facing change.
Absolute left and right turn delta should each be at least 15 degrees when the measured signal is numeric.
Coord drift should remain at or below 0.25 during a clean turn-in-place validation.

success_gates.name: memory_fallback_gate
criteria: A bounded candidate search returns a current-process coord-matching candidate.
The winning candidate shows transform-like basis quality or duplicate-basis agreement strong enough to survive stimulus validation.
No stale lineage assumption is required to explain the result.

success_gates.name: final_gate
criteria: The winning actor-yaw source is identified and labeled as addon-derived or memory-derived.
Any code changes are minimal, targeted, and validated.
A machine-readable recovery artifact captures commands run, source chosen, evidence, validation, and stop point.

stop_conditions.action: Stop actor-yaw recovery and repair the baseline before continuing.

stop_conditions.condition: only stale lineage supports the current hypothesis
stop_conditions.action: Reject the hypothesis and reacquire current-process evidence.

stop_conditions.condition: Cheat Engine debugger attach fails with Error attaching the windows debugger: 87
stop_conditions.action: Log the failure, abandon debugger-trace for that pass, and continue only with addon, reader, or CE scan and inspection lanes.

stop_conditions.condition: camera-specific work becomes the next step without actor-yaw being blocked
stop_conditions.action: Stop and return focus to actor-yaw recovery.

stop_conditions.condition: addon path yields a validated current-process yaw source
stop_conditions.action: Stop broad rediscovery and keep follow-up wiring minimal.
